ksa_text: Ability to exercise structured judgment when developing and recommending analytical approaches under conditions of uncertainty, reasoning through incomplete, ambiguous, or conflicting data to produce actionable conclusions.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Organizational teams are committed to a culture that considers and communicates AI risk.

top_anchors.element_label: Organizational teams are committed to a culture that considers and communicates AI risk.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-A-001 (Core Abilities/Ability) scores 0.439 composite (highest: DDaT at 0.439) and is in_scope for the Data Scientist role. Core role signal: 0 pattern match(es). Seniority is appropriate for this role.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Include consistent with in_scope scope, DDaT signal (0.439), and Core Abilities handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support this Core Ability as a distinct Data Scientist competency?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Analytical abilities (structured reasoning, judgment under uncertainty) are central to DS practice and appear across 60-80% of DS postings as implicit requirements.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Analytical abilities (structured reasoning, judgment under uncertainty) are central to DS practice and appear across 60-80% of DS postings as implicit requirements. Final decision: include.
